name: Orange Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 hot fresh red pepper, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the beef in flour and dip into beaten egg whites, then dredge again in flour.
2. Heat 1 cup of vegetable oil in a wok until almost smoking.
3. Add red pepper, scallions, garlic, and ginger to the hot oil. Cook for about 30 seconds.
4. Add meat pieces to the hot oil in batches, tossing until browned. Remove from the wok and keep warm.
5. Pour off most of the oil, leaving about an inch. Heat sesame oil until very hot.
6. Add vegetables (from the bowl) to the hot oil and stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Stir in jelly, brown sugar, orange juice, orange peel, orange liqueur, and meat stock mixed with cornstarch. Cook until it starts to thicken.
8. Return the meat to the wok and toss until well coated.
9. Transfer the dish to a warm platter and garnish with stir-fried vegetables.
